Across the N client books we backtested from <start> to <end>
no bare number substituted, no rule-of-three, no X-not-Y cadence, no em-dash antithesis, no banned prestige phrases
The three surfaces act on the same event stream at different points in its life.
Webhook Sink captures incoming events and stores them. Replay Console re-executes any stored event against the current handler. Timeline View shows where each event sits in the recorded order
drops the bullet cadence into connected prose
